summary: Decompiled and improved Old Dream Land / Old Pupupu stage code, primarily in src/melee/gr/groldpupupu.c. The PR replaced several placeholder markers with C for grOldPupupu_80210D10 and grOldPupupu_802113E0, completed fn_802112F4, added Old Pupupu stage data/static data tables, and introduced explicit Ground gv structs for oldpupupu/oldpupupu2 in gr/types.h. The decomp.dev report showed 2 new matches, including .sdata2 and fn_802112F4 reaching 100%, and large partial progress on grOldPupupu_802113E0 and grOldPupupu_80210D10. There was no human PR body or review feedback in the slice; small changes in groldkongo.c and grkinokoroute.c appear to be formatting/matching-preserving cleanup.
what_changed: Added includes needed by the newly decompiled Old Pupupu logic, including camera, ftdevice, grdisplay, lbaudio_ax, baselib debug/gobjgxlink/gobjproc, and placeholder.h.
Expanded the static parameter struct behind grOp_804D6A98 with x2C and x30 float fields used as random timing/range inputs in grOldPupupu_802113E0.

Added Old Pupupu data symbols in groldpupupu.c: duplicate animation index tables grOp_804D48C8/grOp_804D48D0/grOp_804D48D8, /GrOp.dat string grOp_803E673C, StageData grOp_803E6748, grOldPupupuSpawnDesc, spawn descriptor table grOp_803E67B0, state sequence table grOp_803E67D8, and side-direction Vec3 table grOp_803E67E4.
Introduced struct grOldPupupu_GroundVars and struct grOldPupupu_GroundVars2 in src/melee/gr/types.h and added them to the Ground gv union.
Replaced generic gp->gv.unk accesses in Old Pupupu code with gp->gv.oldpupupu and gp->gv.oldpupupu2 fields.
Added a dont_inline wrapper, grOldPupupu_802108B4_noinline, used by grOldPupupu_80210D10 when spawning child ground objects.

Implemented grOldPupupu_80210D10, covering a respawn timer, camera bounds lookup via Camera_800307D0, randomized spawn descriptors, HSD_JObj translation setup, grAnime_801C7FF8 animation setup, hidden-flag clearing through Ground_801C3FA4, and respawn timer reseeding.
Completed fn_802112F4 by removing the temporary user_data assignment pattern, using GET_GROUND(gobj), switching on gp->gv.oldpupupu.xDC, and preserving fighter-position/velocity handling.

Implemented most of grOldPupupu_802113E0 as a state machine over gp->gv.oldpupupu.xC8, including animation transitions, shared-state writes to another ground object from Ground_801C2BA4(1), player-side checks through ftLib_800864A8, camera/audio/effect triggers, and state cycling through grOp_803E67D8.
Updated grOldPupupu_80211C1C to read the renamed oldpupupu ground vars from another ground object instead of gv.unk.
Applied formatting-only or matching-style line wrapping changes in grkinokoroute.c and groldkongo.c.
smart_moves: Added named Ground gv structs before replacing gv.unk accesses, making later Old Pupupu decomp work easier to search and reason about without claiming semantic field names prematurely.
Kept uncertain struct fields as offset-style names such as xC4, xC8, xD0, x2C, and x30, which preserves evidence-grounded naming while still separating Old Pupupu layouts from the generic unk union.
Used a small grOldPupupuSpawnDesc typedef to document the layout of the 10-entry spawn table instead of leaving the table as raw bytes or ints.
Used a noinline forwarding wrapper around grOldPupupu_802108B4, a practical matching tactic when a direct call/inlining decision would disturb code generation.
Preserved low-level matching details such as PAD_STACK, HSD_ASSERT line number 0x216, float constants, explicit casts, and direct user_data/GET_GROUND patterns where needed.
Factored repeated stage configuration into StageData and StageCallbacks data matching the stage data conventions used elsewhere in the ground system.
decomp_lessons: For stage files, adding a specific GroundVars struct to gr/types.h can unlock cleaner matching work in multiple functions while keeping field names offset-based until behavior is understood.
Stage object state machines may mirror state between multiple Ground objects via Ground_801C2BA4; when decompiling these, preserve the repeated copy pattern rather than prematurely abstracting it.

Stage spawn logic often depends on camera bounds, randomized tables, JObj transforms, hidden flags, and animation calls; matching may require recovering the static descriptor tables and constants alongside the function body.
When a function call's inlining behavior blocks matching, a local dont_inline wrapper can be an acceptable decomp tactic if clearly scoped and named as a wrapper.
Completing small support functions like fn_802112F4 and .sdata/.sdata2 tables can produce measurable decomp.dev gains even if larger functions remain partial.
No human review comments were present, so reusable lessons come from the diff and bot match report rather than reviewer rationale.
naming_conventions: Old Pupupu stage functions use the grOldPupupu_802xxxxx naming pattern.
Old Pupupu data symbols use the grOp_ prefix, e.g. grOp_804D6A98, grOp_803E6748, and grOp_803E67B0.
Stage data symbol grOp_803E6748 pairs the OLDPUPUPU stage enum with /GrOp.dat and the Old Pupupu callbacks.
New Ground gv union members are named oldpupupu and oldpupupu2, following the stage-specific lower-case convention used by nearby entries such as oldkongo.
Unidentified struct fields remain offset-style names such as xC4, xC8, xD4, xDC, xE0, x2C, and x30 rather than speculative semantic names.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma dont_inline reset / #pragma pop to force grOldPupupu_802108B4_noinline not to inline.
Kept PAD_STACK(0x10) in grOldPupupu_80210D10, indicating stack layout still mattered for matching.
Kept HSD_ASSERT(0x216, jobj) with the original line constant in the spawn setup path.
Used explicit float constants and casts such as 10.0F, 50.0F, -150.0F, 40.0F * (f32) i, and casts from grOp_804D6A98 fields to s32 in random range calls.
Converted a temporary user_data expression in fn_802112F4 into GET_GROUND(gobj), which the bot report says helped bring fn_802112F4 to 100%.
Introduced static data tables alongside code so .data, .sdata, and .sdata2 matching improved, according to the decomp.dev report.
review_feedback: No human review comments or PR body were present in the provided slice.
decomp.dev bot reported matched code increased by 236 bytes and matched data by 56 bytes.
decomp.dev bot reported 2 new matches: main/melee/gr/groldpupupu .sdata2 reached 100.00%, and fn_802112F4 reached 100.00%.
decomp.dev bot reported partial improvements: grOldPupupu_802113E0 reached 87.16%, grOldPupupu_80210D10 reached 85.46%, .data reached 86.86%, and .sdata reached 80.88%.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching grOldPupupu_80210D10 to see how the remaining mismatch from 85.46% was resolved.
Find later PRs touching grOldPupupu_802113E0 to see whether the 87.16% partial implementation became a full match.
Search for oldpupupu.xC4/xC8/xD0/xD4/xD8/xDC/xE0 to refine semantic field names once more behavior is understood.
Compare grOldPupupu spawn descriptor patterns with other stage spawn systems using Camera_800307D0 and Ground_801C3FA4.
Review subsequent changes to grOp_804D6A98 layout fields x2C and x30 for better parameter naming.
